parameters.toolDescription: get_specialties: Returns the full list of available medical specialties with IDs, labels, emojis, and symptom keywords. Always call this when a user mentions any symptom or medical condition to pick the correct spec_id.

reschedule_booking: Reschedules an existing confirmed or pending booking to a new slot. Updates the slot_id, slot_display, slot_date and sets status back to pending. Matches by booking_ref AND patient phone for security.

get_doctors: Fetches active doctors filtered by specialty ID and 6-digit pincode. Returns doctor details including id, name, qualification, experience, rating, fee, and available slot count. Results sorted by highest rating.

get_slots: Fetches available appointment slots for a specific doctor. Use the doctor_id from get_doctors result. Returns slots sorted by date and start time. Only shows available (not booked/blocked) slots from today onwards.
parameters.url: ={{ 'https://kcaykydhganhxuwnvubs.supabase.co/rest/v1/v_available_slots?doctor_id=eq.' + $fromAI('doctor_id', 'Doctor ID from get_doctors result e.g. d1') + '&order=date_string.asc,start_time.asc&limit=20' }}

parameters.toolDescription: get_bookings: Fetches ALL bookings for this patient using their WhatsApp phone number. Returns past and upcoming bookings across all statuses (pending, confirmed, completed, cancelled). Sorted by slot_date ascending so upcoming appear first.

create_booking: Inserts a confirmed appointment into the bookings table. Only call this AFTER the patient has explicitly confirmed the booking summary. booking_ref is auto-generated. Returns the created booking including booking_ref.
parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  phone: $('Ingest Message1').first().json.phone,
  patient_name: $fromAI('patient_name', 'Full name of patient'),
  patient_age: parseInt($fromAI('patient_age', 'Age as integer')),
  patient_gender: $fromAI('patient_gender', 'Male, Female, or Other'),
  doctor_id: $fromAI('doctor_id', 'Doctor ID e.g. d1'),
  doctor_name: $fromAI('doctor_name', 'Doctor full name'),
  slot_id: $fromAI('slot_id', 'Slot ID from get_slots e.g. s1_d1_2026-03-18'),
  slot_display: $fromAI('slot_display', 'Display time e.g. 09:00 - 09:30 AM'),
  slot_date: $fromAI('slot_date', 'Date YYYY-MM-DD'),
  symptoms: $fromAI('symptoms', 'Symptoms or empty string'),
  specialty_id: $fromAI('specialty_id', 'Specialty ID e.g. spec_gp'),
  fee_paid: parseFloat($fromAI('fee_paid', 'Consultation fee as number')),
  status: 'pending',
  payment_status: 'unpaid'
}) }}

parameters.toolDescription: cancel_booking: Cancels a booking by setting status to cancelled. Matches by booking_ref AND the patient's phone number for security. Also handles pending bookings.
